TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tfuya, title = Tfuya, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tfuya} }

S.FORM: alang Tfuya ga niya mki sku Kagi Keng atu Arisan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 122 buwan, 389 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 374 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Cou 90%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tfuya hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tfuya hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tfuya hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tfuya hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Tfuya hya' ga Pnguu. tay mkyahu' na Tfuya hya' ga Tapangʉ. tay 'zil na Tfuya hya' ga Lalauya. giway rgrgyax qu qalang. kahul sa rgrgyax tmnga' mita' ga, wiway yulung qu rgrgyax. blaq balay ngayan. rekisi kayal qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu "Taywan hawsing" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. kisya' glgan ungat kisya' nya'. spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tfuya ga niya mki sku Kagi Keng atu Arisan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 122 buwan, 389 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 374 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Cou 90%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tfuya hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tfuya hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tfuya hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tfuya hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Tfuya hya' ga Pnguu. tay mkyahu' na Tfuya hya' ga Tapangʉ. tay 'zil na Tfuya hya' ga Lalauya. giway rgrgyax qu qalang. kahul sa rgrgyax tmnga' mita' ga, wiway yulung qu rgrgyax. blaq balay ngayan. rekisi kayal qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu "Taywan hawsing" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. kisya' glgan ungat kisya' nya'. spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ t*uja ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kaɣi keŋ atu aris~ɕan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, ʦ~ʨou **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na t*uja ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na t*uja ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na t*uja ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na t*uja ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na t*uja ħjaʔ ɣa pŋuu. taj mkjaħuʔ na t*uja ħjaʔ ɣa tapaŋ*. taj ʔzil na t*uja ħjaʔ ɣa lalauja. ɣiwaj rɣrɣjax qu qalaŋ. kaħul s~ɕa rɣrɣjax tmŋaʔ mitaʔ ɣa, wiwaj juluŋ qu rɣrɣjax. βlaq βalaj ŋajan. rekis~ɕi kajal qmis~ɕan lɣa, ħzjaq βalaj makiʔ te rɣjax ħijaʔ. kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu "tajwan ħaws~ɕiŋ" qu s~ɕpzjaŋ ɣlɣaŋ nħa qalaŋ mus~ɕaʔ ana inuʔ. kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan uŋat kis~ɕjaʔ njaʔ. s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
